task_completion.description: Open the CAMEO Data Manager application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to or create the 'Henderson Chemical Supply' facility
task_completion.visual_evidence: The facility record for 'Henderson Chemical Supply' is open or visible in the facilities list.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the chemical inventory record for 'Sulfuric Acid'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chemical inventory record for 'Sulfuric Acid' (CAS 7664-93-9) is open within the facility.

task_completion.description: Set the Maximum Daily Amount to Range Code 05
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tier II reporting quantities section, the Maximum Daily Amount field is set to Range Code 05 (10,000 - 99,999 lbs).

task_completion.description: Set the Average Daily Amount to Range Code 04
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tier II reporting quantities section, the Average Daily Amount field is set to Range Code 04 (1,000 - 9,999 lbs).

task_completion.description: Set the Number of Days On Site to 365
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Number of Days On Site field is set to 365.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Data Manager interface being used, rather than a terminal or script editing the database directly.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The values are entered in the correct fields within the CAMEO Data Manager application, not in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a database viewer to edit the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is CAMEO Data Manager, not Microsoft Access or another database manipulation tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Chemical Name: Sulfuric Acid
CAS Number: 7664-93-9
Expected Maximum Daily Amount Range Code: 05
Expected Average Daily Amount Range Code: 04
Expected Number of Days On Site: 365
Note: The target facility 'Henderson Chemical Supply' does not exist in the default database and may need to be created by the agent.
